Text
portsIn.value:
Hi,
I am Ani, a designer based in India.

I am a Masters student from the Department of Design IIT Guwahati, following which I worked at Samsung R&D Bengaluru for a year and a half.I recently graduated from Strelka Institute of Media, Design and Architecture as a part of the Terraforming 2020 cohort.

I am interesed in research and speculative design projects in the domain of New Media. And from time to time I pick up freelance graphic / web / interaction design projects.

Send me a mail to start a conversation :)
